The **men's champion of champions** is one of the events at the annual [Bowls England National Championships](/wiki/Bowls_England_National_Championships "Bowls England National Championships").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Venues

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_champion_of_champions)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Venues")]

* 1984–1986 (Hemel Hempstead BC)
* 1987 (Bilton BC, Rugby)
* 1988–1991 (Bath BC)
* 1992–2013 (Worthing Bowls Club, [Beach House Park](/wiki/Beach_House_Park,_Worthing "Beach House Park, Worthing"))
* 2014–present (Victoria Park, Royal Leamington Spa)

## Sponsors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_champion_of_champions)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Sponsors")]

* 1985–1986 (Croxley Script)
* 1988–1990 ([Bristol & West Building Society](/wiki/Bristol_%26_West "Bristol & West"))
* 1992 (The Woolwich)
* 1993 (Sanatogen)
* 2023-2024 ([Aviva](/wiki/Aviva "Aviva"))

## Past winners

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_champion_of_champions)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Past winners")]
